allow: Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(p['name']\) for p in d.get\('plugins',[]\) if 'supa' in p['name'].lower\(\)]")
Bash(node -e "const l=require\('./package-lock.json'\); const n=l.packages['node_modules/next']; console.log\('next deps postcss:', n && n.dependencies && n.dependencies.postcss\);")
Bash(node -e "const l=require\('./package-lock.json'\); const n=l.packages['node_modules/next/node_modules/postcss']; console.log\('nested postcss:', n && n.version\);")

Bash(node -e "console.log\('root postcss:', require\('./node_modules/postcss/package.json'\).version\); try { console.log\('next postcss:', require\('./node_modules/next/node_modules/postcss/package.json'\).version\); } catch\(e\) { console.log\('no nested postcss'\); }")
Bash(node -e "try { console.log\(require\('./node_modules/next/node_modules/postcss/package.json'\).version\); } catch\(e\) { console.log\('no nested postcss found'\); }")
